title: Removed & Unused
body:
### All textures are unused official textures(or should be) that i or someone else found , models were mostly recreated by me and maybe inaccurate.

All Blocks Are Obtainable In survival and some have Advancments.

## Lmcpe stands for : Lame Minecraft Pocket Edition

Something that was supposted to add just the camera and stonecutter but it turned to all of this  :





Brick Pyramid (from infdev)

- Its only 48x48 , it also gets burried in the ground often , and makes terrain generator uh -funny :D
![Rawr](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_191354.png)




Windowless Door

- Official texture found in inf-20100607
![Windowless life](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2cae23dd978e90c1fb59d0af36264497428091e.png)




Stonecutter(old)

- List of migrated recipies [HERE](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/stonecutterlist.txt)

- INACCURATE : furnace

- plan for later : migrate more recipies and disable them for crafting table.

- for now its not useless but not practical or needed.
![Cutting Edge](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_aaa.png)




Camera

- Placing is buggy , Uses Unused texture for item , DOESNT WORK!!!!!!! 
![Egh](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_192709.png)
![Unused Camera Item Form](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Camera_(item_texture)_BE0.png)





Cyan Rose & Paeonia

- Rose makes cyan dye & Paeonia makes pink dye
![Sweet!](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_193154.png)




Chair & Table

- Both were modeled by me.
![Dining Set?](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_193544.png)




Dirt Slab

- Plants will infact , not grow on this.
![Its not as tasty as it looks](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_193756.png)




Light Cobblestone

- Maybe an early version of endstone.
![MY EYESS](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_194011.png)




Alternative Sandstone

- Idk what to say.
![i do not know what to say](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_194142.png)




"Village Border"

- acts as an fence to mobs (my interpretation and how i made it work)
![vilgrbrdr](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_194339.png)




Wax Block and Crystallized Honey

- Crystallized Honey is eatable and wax block is like coal block/etc.
![Thats Tastey](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_194624.png)




Cloud Fluff
![Fluffyy](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_194843.png)




Allow and Deny Blocks

- DECORATION ONLY!
![Yea](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_195048.png)




Purple Arrow.

- Trowable Arrow , not modeled YET , will be and will use the original texture .

- The purple arrow as an item IS NOT AN OFFICIAL TEXTURE !!!
![yayyy](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_202400.png)




Plate Armor

- Something in between leather and chainmail armor.
![cheap pluh](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_203130.png)




Studded Armor

- Something in between iron and diamond armor + it has Knockback Resistance 0.01
![NOT THAT CHEAP](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Zrzut_ekranu_2024-12-12_203056.png)


Colorfull planks!
- idk what more to say tbf
![im serious](https://mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/r/Minecraft_Forge_1.20.1_-_Singleplayer_2024-12-22_17_54_52.png)

Brick Variants
- they were unused and now are decorational, can be made into normal bricks with stonecutter and spawn naturally and are only optainable in the brick piramide.
![i do not know](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/Zrzut_ekranu_2025-01-09_203611.png)

Whatever this thing is
- I dont know.... , made this spawn rarly tho.
![IM CRYING](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/Zrzut_ekranu_2025-01-09_220524.png)

[
Craftings ](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/mydumbassfiles.tixte.co/craftings.png)

### Some of the textures are recreations taken from [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/History_of_textures) , if you want your texture removed please contact me on ace@massivecat.xyz.

# WARNING THIS MOD CHANGES SOME VANILLA TEXTURES TO USE UNUSED ONES , BE AWARE OF THAT.

Any suggestions and bug reports will be appreciated.
